summary: Training EXP for reproducing and writing Audit Office briefing papers with the correct document structure, fonts, colour, tables, and executive language style.
scope_limits: This EXP learns structure, format, and language style, not confidential source content.
Do not use the sample paper topic as default content for future papers.
Do not mark stable until a real briefing paper run also passes human review.
For exact Audit Office formatting, do not rely on Word's default blank styles; use the learned style context with an empty body.
